title: BSP Agent Memory
description: Schema for the removed agent memory capability (io.bsp.agents.memory). Retained for historical reference only — the capability has been removed from the protocol. The memory response body is opaque — different runtimes return different formats.

agentMemory.description: Agent memory state. The protocol does not prescribe its structure — it is opaque and implementation-specific.

agentId.description: The agent this memory belongs to.

state.description: The memory state — opaque to the protocol. Could be any JSON value.
